description_long: This is a standard Western-style toilet with a rectangular, exposed cistern mounted above a rounded bowl. The toilet is primarily white, with a slightly off-white, padded seat that covers the bowl. The cistern features a visible flush lever on the left side, and the base is broad and flat, designed for stable floor mounting. The overall design is utilitarian, with smooth ceramic surfaces and minimal decorative elements. The seat and lid are both present, and the toilet appears to be made mostly of porcelain with some metal and plastic components. The object is typical for use in public restrooms, residential bathrooms, or other urban facilities.
description: A white, floor-mounted toilet with an exposed cistern, padded seat, and visible flush lever. The design is simple and functional, with smooth ceramic surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cistern, closed padded seat, and the broad base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the seat profile, bowl curvature, and the flush lever on the cistern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the base, with no visible seat or lever.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the seat and lid, with the flush lever partially visible on the opposite side.
